creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 233073
Upgrade to 7.0.0+

Upgrade to a snapshot after 7.0.0, in order to fix a failure reported in PR 262781 with a recent OCaml.

Important note: all the PR related to Ocaml ports must be committed at the same time!

Remark: coreutils is a widely installed package, and it would be better to rename gwc in order to avoid the conflict.
